ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector_classification" TEXT /* Sector classification of the stock */,
  "industry_classification" TEXT /* Industry classification of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Current dividend yield of the stock */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Current price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the price data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "real_price" REAL /* Actual closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "predict_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "daily_moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "daily_moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "relative_strength_index" REAL /* Relative strength index of the stock price */,
  "bollinger_bands" REAL /* Bollinger Bands of the stock price */,
  "daily_high_price" REAL /* Daily high price of the stock for the past year */,
  "daily_low_price" REAL /* Daily low price of the stock for the past year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the prediction is made */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* Upper confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* Lower confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the prediction */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the prediction */,
  "root_mean_squared_percentage_error" REAL /* Root mean squared percentage error of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_name FOREIGN KEY ("model_name") REFERENCES models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., LSTM, Random Forest) */,
  "training_data_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training data */,
  "training_data_end" TEXT /* End date of the training data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
